name: Agent-Browser Scraper
description: Primary deep website crawler using the agent-browser CLI. Given a start URL (for the main site or a competitor) and optional high-level instructions, drive a real browser, navigate complex flows, and build structured snapshots of each page. Use this first for deep analysis of UX, information architecture, and content when the site is JS-heavy or has multi-step navigation; also use it on competitor domains during competitor and market analysis.
